responses: Hello! Welcome to the College Student Assistant Chatbot. I can help you with admissions, exams, library, hostel, scholarships and placements.
Hi there! I am your college virtual assistant. Ask me anything related to campus facilities or student services.
The college library is located in Block B on the second floor. Students can borrow books using their college ID card.
Our library provides textbooks, journals, and digital resources. It is open from 9 AM to 6 PM on weekdays.
Semester exams usually take place in December and May. Please check the college website or academic notice board for the official timetable.
Exam schedules are generally announced one month before the exam period.
The college provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls with WiFi, study rooms and dining facilities.
Students can apply for hostel accommodation through the administration office.
Students can apply for admission through the official college website or by visiting the admission office.
Admission requires submitting academic certificates, identity proof and completing the application form.
The college fee structure depends on the course and department. Students can check the official website or contact the accounts office.
Fees can be paid online through the college portal or at the accounts section of the administration block.
The principal is the head of the college and is responsible for academic administration and management.
For the latest information about the principal, please check the official college website.
The placement cell helps students get internship and job opportunities by connecting with companies.
Students can register with the placement office to receive updates about campus recruitment drives.
Each department has its own office where students can contact faculty members or the Head of Department for academic help.
Department offices are usually located within the respective academic blocks.
Students can apply for scholarships based on merit or financial need through the scholarship section of the college portal.
Government scholarships and private scholarships are available. Please contact the student welfare office for assistance.
The college canteen is located near the main academic block and serves meals and snacks.
Canteen operates from 8 AM to 5 PM with affordable food options for students.
